title: CI matrix from zero: Ubuntu Node 18/20/22 full verify + honest Windows lane (D8)
action: .github/workflows/ci.yml (greenfield): on push/PR to main; ubuntu-latest matrix node 18/20/22; checkout + setup-node + run the FULL configured verify via a new scripts/verify_all.mjs that reads .bee/config.json commands.verify and execs it (single-sourced — CI can never drift from the local chain; also add a --list flag printing the suites). .github/workflows/windows.yml: windows-latest, node 20/22; ONLY the provably portable core (advisor R6): node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs, node scripts/test_portable_paths.mjs, node scripts/test_config_validate.mjs — worktree/store suites are EXCLUDED with an inline comment saying they are unproven on Windows path/git semantics and will be added after a real windows-latest run confirms them (do not ship an assumed-green lane); plus a PowerShell parse check of scripts/install.ps1 (PS 5.1-compatible syntax via [System.Management.Automation.PSParser]::Tokenize or Parser::ParseFile). Real install.ps1 E2E stays the named backlog item, stated in a workflow comment. Local verification: both YAML files parse (node with a yaml parser or a minimal hand check script), scripts/verify_all.mjs --list runs green locally.

truths: ci.yml runs the exact configured verify chain (single-sourced, no drift copy)
windows lane runs only suites verified OS-portable, each exclusion commented honestly
install.ps1 gets a PowerShell parse check; E2E absence is stated, not faked
both workflows are valid YAML and reference existing scripts only

trace.outcome: CI from zero: ubuntu Node 18/20/22 matrix running the single-sourced verify chain via verify_all.mjs; honest windows lane (3 proven-portable suites + PS 5.1 parse of install.ps1, exclusions named); both workflows YAML-valid
trace.verification_evidence:
# g22-5 — done report (CI matrix + verify_all)

Worker: g22-5-worker (sonnet, isolated worktree). Worker commit `2e6350d`,
merged into main. 2026-07-19.

## What shipped
- `scripts/verify_all.mjs`: executes `.bee/config.json` commands.verify
  verbatim (single source — CI can never drift from local); `--list` prints
  the 27 chain commands; `--only N` runs one.
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml`: push/PR to main; ubuntu-latest × Node 18/20/22;
  runs `node scripts/verify_all.mjs`; timeout + per-ref concurrency cancel.
- `.github/workflows/windows.yml`: windows-latest × Node 20/22; ONLY the
  three suites the worker READ and proved portable (test_lib 347 asserts,
  test_portable_paths, test_config_validate — path.join throughout, argv-form
  spawnSync git only, a win32 branch already present in commands_detect);
  every excluded suite named in a comment with the honest reason; install.ps1
  gets a PS 5.1 PSParser syntax job; ps1 E2E named as backlog.

## Verification (fresh command output)
Orchestrator on main post-merge: `verify_all --list` = 27 lines (matches
config split); both YAML parse clean (python3 yaml.safe_load → YAML_OK);
lib_mirror PASS. Worker additionally ran three real suites through
verify_all (--only 1/5/27 → all PASS).

## Diff
3 files changed, 222 insertions(+) — all greenfield, zero overlap with
sibling work.
trace.verify_output: Post-merge on main: verify_all --list = 27 commands (matches config); ci.yml + windows.yml YAML_OK via python3 yaml.safe_load; lib_mirror PASS. Worker ran real suites through verify_all (--only 1/5/27 all PASS). Worker commit 2e6350d.
